cases.input: We need to add Stripe monthly subscriptions with a 14-day trial to our SaaS; gate access on subscription status.
GitHub is POSTing push and pull_request events to our endpoint; verify them and react without polling.
Protect our signup and password-reset forms from bots using reCAPTCHA v3 with an invisible score and a fallback for borderline users.
Send order-status push notifications to web and Android users via FCM, with per-category preferences.
Stripe is retrying the same checkout.session.completed event and our user got provisioned twice — make fulfillment replay-safe.
Our frontend currently reads the reCAPTCHA score and lets the request through — move the decision server-side and stop trusting the client.
We're launching paid plans and want to push a receipt notification right after the charge succeeds — set both up.
Wire the Stripe webhook endpoint, but we haven't created the signing secret yet.
FCM sends are erroring with registration-token-not-registered and our delivery metrics look skewed — clean up dead device tokens.
An attacker re-sent a captured-but-valid SendGrid webhook payload — block replays at our endpoint.
